questionHtml:
Which value of q, in J, has the correct number of significant figures?

q = mcΔT

where m = 2.500 g, c = 4.18 J g−1 K−1 and ΔT = 0.60 K.

A.     6

B.     6.3

C.     6.27

D.     6.270
